title: Session 10 — The Cube
bodyText:
**TL;DR: The party escaped the essence-draining Primordial Cube (meeting the disguised druid Trunks inside it); the cube melted into the river, and a grateful voice opened a path to meet.**

# What happened
- The **Primordial Cube**: resistant to half of everything, shedding goo into the river when hit.
- Several were pulled inside; there [[pc-felson|Felson]] met a crab — actually **a disguised druid: [[pc-trunks|Trunks]]** (joined).
- Everyone inside felt **Essence Drain** — life force, not just magic.
- Ropes got everyone out; the cube split and **melted into the river**.
- The vines spored the little myconid; a grateful voice thanked the party for saving **its child** and asked to meet, and the vines opened a path.

> [!dm] The cube dissolving into the river is **how pools grow**. Nobody at the table knows.

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] The cube — split and melted into the river.
- The grateful voice asked to meet; the vines opened a path.

# Threads
[[pc-trunks]] · [[pc-felson]]
